                        STM32CubeProgrammer v2.22.0
      -------------------------------------------------------------------

ST-LINK SN  : 066BFF514852898767094734
ST-LINK FW  : V3J11M3
Board       : NUCLEO-F401RE
Voltage     : 3.30V
SWD freq    : 4000 KHz
Connect mode: Normal
Reset mode  : Software reset
Device ID   : 0x423
Revision ID : Rev Z
Device name : STM32F401xB/C
Flash size  : 256 KBytes (default)
Device type : MCU
Device CPU  : Cortex-M4
BL Version  : 0x90
